title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that humans cannot compete with AI on raw knowledge and should instead focus on curiosity, judgment, and discovery. He invokes Ramanujan's legacy to suggest that unconventional genius and undiscovered talent remain humanity's comparative advantage in an age of machine knowledge.
